chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1536 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution of main petition, as notices not issued as costs and copies have not been supplied by the learned Counsel for petitioner. 30.01.2018. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. This Constitutional Petition is called for hearing. Neither petitioner nor his Counsel is present. No intimation received. Today, the case is fixed for orders as to non-prosecution of the main petition as the petitioner has not paid the cost for service to the other side as well as copies of the petition have not been supplied. It also appears from the record that on the last date of hearing none was also present on behalf of the petitioner. This petition was filed on 13.06.2016 since then nobody is diligently pursuing this petition. Therefore, it appears that the petitioner has no interest in this petition, which is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
